title: XPeng Q4 2022 Earnings Preview: What to Expect
text: XPeng reported Q4 2022 earnings scheduled before market open on March 17. Wall Street expected a loss of $0.31 per share in Q4 versus earnings of $0.18 per share reported in the prior-year period. Revenue was expected to decline by 39% year-over-year to $813 million. Supply-chain headwinds and heightened competition during the quarter impacted the company's Q4 delivery numbers, with the electric vehicle maker's fourth-quarter vehicle delivery report reflecting a 46.8% year-over-year fall in total deliveries to 22,204 vehicles. Strict lockdown measures in China due to COVID-19 spread might have impacted the company's production capacity in the quarter. Expenses remained elevated in the to-be-reported quarter due to promotional activities.
